creator: jbryant@tfs.net
text:
To tune a FM radio station on these cards, one must tune 5.6MHz low.  For example, to get 98.90 [The Rock], you have to tune 93.30.  The -Theatre series cards are new, and are using the 'next-generation' chips, and it may be likely that all future cards will require the fix presented here.

Fix: Apply the following kludge to /usr/src/sys/pci/brooktree848.c, then add 'options BKTR_HAUPPAUGE_THEATRE_FM' to your kernel config.  rebuild your kernel, and reboot.  This fix should suffice until the driver maintainer wakes up and reads his two day old email and comes up with a more elegant solution.
How-To-Repeat: 
	See description.
